name: Clergyman Ω
ability: You start knowing all other clergymen. If one of you dies, the others might die as well. [+0 or +2 Clergymen]
flavor: The church bell tolls. The masses gather. Choruses of choirboys and members of the clergy echo throughout the town. Devout believers of HIM join us in this heavenly parade. I thank you dear child for opening your arms to HIS embrace.
firstNightReminder: Wake the Clergyman and tell them if there are any other clergymen and who they are.
otherNightReminder: If a clergyman died tonight, the others might die.

name: Shepherd Ω
ability: Each night*, choose a Demon character: if in-play, you die.
flavor: It is my duty as a Shepherd to guide these Lambs to a safer place, even if I lose myself in the process.
otherNightReminder: The Shepherd might choose a demon.

name: Yes Dashii Ω
ability: Both of your townsfolk neighbors are sober and healthy.
flavor: “By the virtues of Arnoch, I feel thy light scent. By the blessed moon and his pleasant few of large frowning mortals, I purify thee. By the cursed day and the revealed heights of the delightful and holy land, I begin thy aristocratic death underneath this void.”

name: Reflector Ω
ability: Each night, the first player’s ability to target you is instead reflected onto another player.

name: Joe Ω
ability: If you claim “Joe”, the storyteller will execute you at anytime of their choosing before the end of that day. This ability is disabled when 5 or fewer players remain.

name: Sniper Ω
ability: Twice per game, during nominations, privately message the storyteller to guess a player’s role. If correct, the guessed player dies immediately.
flavor: That’s why you shouldn’t hard claim on Day 1…
